name: EMI Spooler v1 (KAN-46) — Outlook → Supabase Queue

parameters.content:
## EMI Spooler v1 — KAN-46 Durable Queue

**Purpose:** Fast ingest from Outlook → Supabase email_queue table.
**Execution time target:** <2 seconds per email
**No heavy work here** — Gemini, XLSX parse, notifications all happen in the Worker workflow.

### Flow
1. Outlook Trigger fires (every 1 min, when new email arrives)
2. Code node: extract metadata + binary attachments as base64
3. Code node: POST to Supabase /rest/v1/email_queue (with dedup via Prefer header)
4. Done

### Why this is safe
- Outlook Trigger consumes email → Spooler persists to durable queue BEFORE execution ends
- If Supabase POST fails: retry 3x with 2s delay (built into Code node)
- If all retries fail: throws error → n8n shows failed execution, DK notified
- UNIQUE(message_id) dedup: if Spooler fires twice somehow, second insert is no-op

### Rollback
Deactivate this workflow in n8n UI → activate v12.4 pipeline. Takes <5 sec.
Unread emails in Outlook will be picked up by v12.4 on next poll.

### NOT handled here (intentionally)
- Skip filters (empty body, file type detection, etc.) → Worker handles
- ONE loop guard included (self-send) to prevent notification→trigger loop
- Gemini, XLSX, notifications → Worker
